entry.title: Re: HTML modification in email editor
entry.content: You can also use the HTML block, see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_MARKETING_CLOUD/b88f770e4b7c4ecead5477e7a6c7b8f7/fde0fed7f6e24af3900ae7a8dcdd5e5c.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: 403 Forbidden error on POST http call after XSUAA Implementation
entry.content:
Hey junwu,
I have setup some generic function for calling request.
Here i give some example how i call it.

let Ourl = `/odata/v4/stoneman-crf/MEnum?$filter=EnumType eq 'MENUCODE'`;
        await this.createNewModelUsingAPI('GET', Ourl, null, this.getCflListViewDataSourceModelName());
createNewModelUsingAPI: async function (oRequestType, sUrl, oRequestData, sModelName) {

                await this.callApi(oRequestType, sUrl, oRequestData)
                    .then((response) => {
                        // writing like this .then ((data) => {}) gives the parent context, in this case the controller.
                        console.log('Success:', response);

                        let data = this.prepareData(sUrl, response);

                        var oModel = new JSONModel();
                        oModel.setData(response); // 'data' is the response from your API call
                        this.getView().setModel(oModel, sModelName);

                        this.getView().getModel(sModelName);

                    })
                    .catch(function (error) {
                        console.error('Error:', error);
                    });
            }
callApi: function (type, url, reqData) {
        oBusyIndicator.show(0);
        let oRequestData = '';

        if (typeof reqData === 'undefined') {
          oRequestData = '';
        }

        if (typeof reqData !== 'undefined') {
          if (reqData !== '') {
            oRequestData = JSON.stringify(reqData);
          }
        }

        const apiHandler = this;
        return new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {
          $.ajax({
            url: url,
            method: type,
            data: oRequestData,
            dataType: 'json',
            contentType: 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
            crossDomain: true,
            async: true,
            /*headers: {
                            "Content-Type": "application/json",
                            "Cookie": "B1SESSION=fc34c65a-4da1-11ef-8000-00155d025317"
                        },*/
            xhrFields: {
              withCredentials: true
            },
            cors: [
              {
                enabled: false
              }
            ],

            success: function (data) {
              // Check if setApiResponseObject is available in the current scope
              console.log(data);
              apiHandler.setApiResponseObject(true, data);
              oBusyIndicator.hide();
              resolve(data);
            }.bind(this),

            error: function (error) {
              // Handle error
              console.error(error);
              oBusyIndicator.hide();
              apiHandler.setApiResponseObject(false, error);
              reject(error);
            }.bind(this)
          });
        });
      }

Can you help me how to handle "header" in callApi function?

entry.title: Re: Unable to consume data from a odata service
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski 

Coming to the other page(product details page), while I am doing the connection to the required data and binding that data to appropriate components and also done the navigation so that when a user clicks on a product on the product list page, the user will be taken to the product details page and be shown the product information, I am facing some issues.

while doing the navigation I am binding the required parameters with the data item in repeat elements.(material and serial).

and on the product details page, I have created two page parameters named material and serial and binding them to the data variable while choosing the data variable type as single data record.

and on the User interface page binding the elements to the required data variable fields.

 

but while previewing, no data is returned.

Please help me to correct this error.
Thank You.

Best Regards,
Yashmin Behera

entry.title: Need guidance on managed system configuration setup pre-requisites as a part of solman SP 19 upgrade
entry.content:
Hi ,
We are planning to upgrade our solman stack from sps 15 to sps 19. Hence need your help on below queries.
1) LM-Service component not get update along with Java stack as we are updating from sp15 to sp19 so we have to update it manually as per the note after Java stack upgrade. Please check below point from note and confirm, we are at SP 14 PL 09

SAP Solution Manger SP 19 = ST 720 SP19 + LM-SERVICE 7.20 SP14 P17 or higher

2) We don't see pre-requisite details from managed system/technical monitoring perspective for SPS 19 upgrade apart from this LM-Service core. could you please let us know if anything else we have to check apart from it or we good to go.
3) can we incl...(truncated)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need guidance on managed system configuration setup p...
entry.content:
Hello ,

Please see the answers with the following.
1.Can we include LM-Service component upgrade along with Java stack upgrad?
A: yes, you can include LM-Service component upgrade along with Java stack upgrade, but after upgrading LM-service, the SP level would be newest, and the patch level may not be the newest.
However, you can upgrade LM-Service separately, by this way, you can get the newest patch level.
If further help is required, you can contact BC-UPG-TLS-TLJ

2.If we are upgrading JVM 8.1 for diagnostic agent in solman, do we have to update same version in managed systems as well.
A: you can upgrade them separately, they're separate and independent.
If further help is required, you can contact SV-SMG-DIA-SRV-AGT

3.If there is a prerequisite for technical monitoring configuration when upgrading the SOLMAN JAVA stack?
A: There is not a prerequisite, but if you encounter issues/errors with technical monitoring configuration after upgrading the SOLMAN JAVA stack, you can contact SV-SMG-MON.

Last but not least, it is necessary to re-execute the steps with the yellow status in SOLMAN_SETUP -> Mandatory Configurations after upgrading Solution Manager, if you meet errors/issues, please create a case/chat to SAP.

Best regards,
Leo
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: MATERIAL_MAINTAIN_DARK writes change log without change
entry.content:
Thank you for your feedback.

The two notes didn't quite make sense to me.

The call of the block and how the structures are filled can be seen above.

I don't know what else would help in terms of information. When I try to test the problem myself with a material via the GatewayClient, the logic always works perfectly. (i.e. change DISGR change document)

Before I call the MaterialMaintainDark, I check the MARC-DISGR field with the DB to reduce the number of materials in the module if no changes are made there anyway.

SAP version is still the latest R/3.

Greetings

Daniel

entry.title: Cannot Adapt UI for Task List Maintenance
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement for adapt the UI when we create a new task list for maintenance. For example to takeout some field that will be not used.

The problem is we cannot find the button for Adapt UI, we already check App : Create Task List, Change Task List, and Display Task List.

Any Suggestions?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How can I add code formatting in a comment in response to a question on the SAP Community page?
entry.content:
Hello poweruser of this community platform!

I have recently experienced a situation where a question in the Technology area got my attention and I did not feel like my response was wroth an answer but rather a comment. I needed to add some lines of code but in the comment section I can only hit enter to submit my post but have no option to add formatted text like a list of entries or even a code snippet. Can someone link me a guide or tell me how to do it?

Kind regards!

PS: Or is it simply "open a new tab, start a question and use the editor, copy the text and insert it in the comment field + close the question tab"?

entry.title: Re: RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition: Understanding Roles And Responsibility
entry.content: Really insighful. Bookmarked your blog. Do you have the same for Grow and S/4H Public edition? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Total Deduction in the HRFOMS Payslip not correct
entry.content:
Hi, 

My recommendation in this case is go to HRFORMs transaction and execute the test print progam. Compare the result with the configuration. With this it should be possible to understand from where HRFORMs is calculating this value and change the configuration accordingly to obtain the desire result. I attach a screenshot how to execute the test print program. 

Also to review the configuration you can check SAP Note 744147 - hrforms, there is a very good cookbook attached to the note.

Hope it helps

entry.title: 回复： Quality certificates issue with printing for differen...
entry.content: Hi Matt_sui, I have linked both form templates to its appropriate Output type in Output determination app, meaning both templates were linked to same output type. I don’t know if it’s allowed, but logic tells me it is, otherwise I don't see another way to use two different forms.

entry.title: Re: Boost your Recruiting using embedded AI features
entry.content:
Hi @maseitner 

Thanks for the great insights! I was wondering: The candidate has the possibility to change and delete his/her skills in candidate profile. Can the recruiter make changes to a candidate's skills set and if so, are recruiters' changes visible to the candidate? This might be an issue because recruiters' evaluations should not be visible to candidates.

KR,

Lisa

entry.title: Re: Enable OData Streams in RAP

entry.title: Re: No PDF found
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

the error usually means, that the validation of existing form Template fails due to missing form or rule.

Please open a case, this needs to be checked from support side.

You can address the case to me.

 

Best regards

 

Didi

If you like drop me an email in and we can discuss this quickly.

Best regards

Didi

entry.title: Re: ByDesign Mobile app – How to add extension field?
entry.content:
Hi Simon,

a good start into 2025. Not all extension fields which are added via the desktop application are supported in the Mobile App.

For example.https://me.sap.com/notes/3074090

I would recommend to open a case and share the extension field you see in the UI but not in the mobile app.

Please also have a look here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CLOUD_APPLICATIONS_STUDIO/cbcebe3cfb1647a8b0322c18dbb0b481/27b4ca97686249d7af64048a48335e82.html

 

Best regards

Didi

Mridul

entry.title: Assigning WBS elements to a Service Order
entry.content:
Hi expert！

I have assigned a WBS Element to the Service Order.
Item No. 20 is an external detail and has a WBS element assigned to it.(Item category SEW2)

When you release the Service Order, a Purchase Requistion is created for Item No. 20.
When I view the Purchase Requisition, I see that it does not contain any WBS elements.

Why is the WBS element blank?
Is this a bug?

 

Soma

entry.title: Failed to get access token, contact your administrator
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

B1 Version:10.0 FP2208

I’m using the SAP client to log in, but I get the error code “Failed to get access token, contact your administrator.” This error only occurs on my local machine; the SAP server can log in successfully.

Could I be missing some settings on the SAP server? I need help resolving this issue.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: How to trigger script form to auto generate spool?
entry.content: Yes, CL_RSPO_SPOOLID_TO_PDF=>GET_SPOOL_PDF can be called in the background.

entry.title: Re: How can I add code formatting in a comment in response to a question on the SAP Community page?
entry.content: Probably it's already in the scope of future improvements (already asked: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/initial-comment-field-is-inadequate/qaq-p/13595925). Same issue for me and for other people. My solution: I first post the comment, then I edit it to add the code or image. I think that you can't do better for now.

entry.title: Re: Set "Prevent Output" flag in Purchase Order Using Man...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Hope you are doing well!

In order to resolve the issue, you can go to the Purchase Order payload, use the indicator <PreventDocumentOutputIndicator> true </PreventDocumentOutputIndicator>. This will help you to prevent out and avoid sending the document to the supplier.  

Note: In addition to this, you can use the below indicators. 

<OrderPurchaseOrderActionIndicator> true </OrderPurchaseOrderActionIndicator> 
<CancelPurchaseOrderActionIndicator> true </CancelPurchaseOrderActionIndicator> 
<FinishDeliveryPOActionIndicator> true </FinishDeliveryPOActionIndicator> 
<FinishInvoicePOActionIndicator> true </FinishInvoicePOActionIndicator> 

Please refer to KBA: 3552457 - How to Prevent Output While Creating Purchase Orders Using Web Service? 

Thanks and Regards,

Pavithra

entry.title: Re: SAP By Desing specific Scan to Build
entry.content: Hello Dieter, E-mail: roland.rueegg@agilita.ch thank you.

entry.title: Re: How long will it take to roll back to a restore point?
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Hope you are doing well!

In general, the rollback of a Restore Point would typically take 4 hours to 1 day but may vary depending on the tenant data.

I hope this information helps with your query.

Thanks and Regards,

Pavithra

entry.title: Re: SAP BW Authorization - S_RS_COMP
entry.content:
Hi Lee,

In the authorization objects S_RS_COMP & S_RS_COMP1 you can control the following fields to provide the display authority (to avoid the save button).

1. Field name - Activity - Display 03 and Execute 16

2.  Field name - Name (ID) of a reporting component - (define the query names)

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Withholding Tax in payment postings for Paraguay - SA...
entry.content:
Hi Mmontenegro,

Currently, Tax Procedure Extensibility is not available for customer or partner maintenance in S/4HANA Public Cloud for custom local versions. However, if there is a legal requirement to address any specific custom local version need, changes can be made through Expert Configuration. To initiate this process, you can request Expert Configuration from SAP by raising a WCR. Please contact your assigned CSP, PE, or CSM with this request, and they will create the WCR on your behalf.

Best Regards,

Shivendra Mathur

entry.title: Re: Recorded Employee Time - report
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Hope you are doing well!

The approver can be seen under the field "Reporting Line Unit - Manager" in the "Recorded Employee Time” report. 

Thanks and Regards,

Pavithra

entry.title: Re: STOCK TRANSFER ORDER PROCESS FROM SAP TO NON SAP SYSTEM
entry.content:
Hello @mk_04 

If the ship-to party uses a third party system, then a stock transfer process is a regular outbound process from the shipping party perspective, i.e.

  • sales order
  • outbound delivery
  • picking/packing
  • goods issue

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Changing the Work Center Names
entry.content:
Dear Ata,

Hope you are doing well!

This is a known issue in the UI framework due to the limitations of the list view for large lists in conjunction with the column-based filtering function.  

When you are requesting for the large data list view, you will get above dump. It is not a generic problem of the tool, but caused by the limitations of the list view for large lists. This is what you have on the view Text Elements, as this list shows all element instances on the business object via direct association in conjunction with the column-based filters. These should not be used. 

Resolution:  

User has to go to the “Search Translations tab” and search for the selective target text using the query parameters instead of searching the target text directly in the “View Translations tab” by filtering.  

To adjust the texts, follow below steps: 
1.    Go to Application & User Management Work Center. 
2.    Navigate to Text Pool Administration. 
3.    Select any Text Pool Id & Edit it. 
4.    Go to ‘View Translations tab’ and click on ‘Search Translations’. 
5.    Go to ‘Search Translations tab’ & search with specific text directly using the query parameters. 
6.    Select the resulted record & click on ‘Edit target Text’. 

Note: The Search Translations is at the top of the View Translations tab and should not confused with the Search Texts tab. 

You can also refer to KBA: 3415399 - Error" Please try resuming your work .If you still face issue. Report an Incident " while using Text Adaptation Tool 

Thanks and Regards,

Pavithra

entry.title: Re: Error occured while settling the Asset AUC
entry.content:
Hi,

 

did you check already following SAP Note: 1659124 - Error Message AA316 or AA317 during Partial Retirement

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: How to set up 1 storage unit only per bin in putaway...
entry.content:
Hello @ferlis 

Looks like Strategy L: Next Empty Storage Bin is the obvious choice.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP ByDesign : Server error "INVALID_CHARACTERISTIC_N...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Hope you are doing well!

OData Query URL should consist of work center detail, end point from where data has to be fetched. 
Consider the same example : 
https://XXXXXX.sapbydesign.com/sap/byd/odata/sapbyd.XXXXXXX_XXXXQueryResult 
This does not have work center mentioned in it. 

The correct format of OData Query would be as : 
https://XXXXXX.sapbydesign.com/sap/byd/odata/ana_businessanalytics_analytics.svc/XXXXXXX_XXXXQueryResults

If the issue persists, then raise a case to SAP support to investigate further. 

Thanks and Regards,

Pavithra

entry.title: Re: HTML modification in email editor
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: Re: How can I add code formatting in a comment in response to a question on the SAP Community page?
entry.content:
Thanks @Sandra_Rossi! I will try it out 🙂

  • 1
  • 2
  • 3
data(var) type c length 10 value 'It works!'.

entry.title: SAP workflow - dynamic agent assign. via role - direction needed
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m looking for advice on assigning agent(s) to a workflow task based on the roles assigned to users. The challenge is that the role needs to be dynamic, depending on the order type relevant to the workflow. While I can enter a single role in a task, it seems I cannot use a variable from the container.

Eventually, we might need to implement this using a rule and function module, but I’m wondering if there’s a simpler solution. Any ideas?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to monitor the failed PI messages.
entry.content:
Hi,

We have setup icmon alerting for sxmb_moni message failure at ECC end.
The alert condition is for application error.
However, we are getting alerts for each and every messages through that channel irrespective of status.
We have additionally setup parameters for critical message failure with condition application error.
Please help to get the alert only for failed messages

Best regards,



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to monitor the failed PI messages.
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

To monitor the faild messages only, I recommend you to use template "Process Integration (PI)" and enable metrics "Number of cancelled PI messages" and "Number of erroneous PI messages". This template can be used for the monitoring of messages processed both in the ABAP and JAVA stack of PI.

Follow further information in: Available Monitoring Content 
and the guidance on how to set it up:  Interface and Connection Monitoring Setup 

Best regards,
Ellie
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Trial Integration Suite in Singapore has deployment i...
entry.content: Problems seems to be resolved, at least for trail in Singapore.

entry.title: Re: Could someone please share configuration documents or...
entry.content:
Hello @Subham15 

Please use S-User ID to access the link

entry.title: Re: FLP failed to load catalogs after system copy - what...

entry.title: Re: Recorded Employee Time - report

thank you for your answer, but unfortunately, we are looking for the "Approver" name from Approval Information, not Line Manager, as it could be 2 different persons.

Magda

entry.title: Re: Overhead Planning and Analytical Reporting of Management accounting
entry.content:
Hello!

I want to follow the same steps and change default /ERP/SFIN_R01 to /ERP/SFIN_V20. For this I run RSPLAN, click on Filter, choose /ERP/SFIN* and press F4. Unfortunately there is no filter available. If I open the filters there is one filter available, named FINCS_RULE_VAL_F.

Please advice how to populate the filters so that I can the steps as described. 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Displaying content after the fixed footer main window in a samrtform
entry.content:
Hi,

I am displaying a table in the main window of the smartforms and to display the footer at the fixed bottom position I am using the method mentioned in the thread by creating a folder within the main window say “Check_Footer”.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/footer-at-the-bottom-of-the-page-in-smartforms/m-p/7777043

All this is working fine. Now I have a requirement to display a disclaimer as an additional page ( fixed content of 1 page) after the main window. If I give a command to go to the next page in the main window, the footer window will not show.

How do we handle the scenario of displaying the footer only after the table content at the fixed bottom position and an additional page after the content of the main window?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to register data with multi-select using RAP
entry.content:
Maybe you can try this annotation for your action button:

  @ui.lineItem: [{ position: 20,label: 'Item Number'}
                ,{ type: #FOR_ACTION,
                   dataAction: 'approveItem',
                   label: 'Approve',
                   position:10,
                   invocationGrouping: #CHANGE_SET,
                   importance: #HIGH}]

invocationGrouping: #CHANGE_SET

This annotation allows the custom button to process multiple line selections at once

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Reuse of ECC custom field at S/4HANA with Clean Core principles
entry.content:
Hi Mio,

as far as I know changes will follow technical transport rules. That means if all changes on table level will be stored in one transport request, activation will be done automatically at one step similar to report  RADMASG0_C3. At development system usually you don't have such a mechanism therefore activation has to be done with report RADMASG0_C3.

Best Regards
Andi

entry.title: 回复： Quality certificates issue with printing for differen...
entry.content:
Hi Anita,

I don't know how you maintain the rules. Basically, you should not assign 2 form templates to the exactly same conditions.
Maybe you can check whether the following blog is feasible in your scenario?
How to generate multiple output items for production orders with different form templates

Best Regards
Matt

entry.title: Re: Email Notifications in SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation
entry.content:
Hi @Pankaja,

If you are using your own mail service you should check the settings there. For the SAP mail service there should not be any latency - at least I am not aware of it. I would suggest to create a ticket for the SAP Alert Notification Service colleagues (BC-CP-LCM-ANS) in this case.

Best,

Moritz

entry.title: Re: Without SPOOL Dynpro!
entry.content: what is the solution? having same issue

entry.title: Re: CDS for Customer hierarchy
entry.content: DELETED

entry.title: Re: CDS for Customer hierarchy
entry.content:
Hello,

Has this issue been resolved? We also need to read Customer Hierarchies but there is no released API (CDS or ODATA). The Group reporting API doens't meet our requirement.

Regards

entry.title: Q : How to notify to user when invoices are not fully cleared in F110 (Payment run)
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question regarding an issue similar to the one described in the below-mentioned SAP Notes.
3318007 - Error VF 348 in F110 - SAP for Me
I referred to SAP Note 3318007 and made the suggested changes, but there were no visible effects after implementing them.

In F110, when the user execute the Payment Run, it shows a green status with the message "Payment run has been carried out." However, I found that not all invoices are actually cleared.

Is there a way to modify the message to display a warning or error in such cases, using BTE, BAdI, or Enhancement?

It is important for users to know that the target invoices have been fully cleared.
Please let me know if there is an effective way to solve this.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Create user by API on BTP subaccount
entry.content:
Hello @abiskop,

Thanks for the quick answer! I'll check, but I was wondering if there's some way of doing it by API for example posting it from Integration Suite as I would like to automatize it in some way when it is a large list of users.

Thank you very much.

Best regards.

entry.title: Batch Inbound Integration - Use of element ChangeOrdinalNumberValue
entry.content:
Hello,

We want to use SOAP API Batch Inbound Integration for connecting a third party WMS:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/9ce855c709ce4f5c99b685903461106e/d51b13a65cc744cf97a28a19e617d9dd.html?version=2408.500
https://api.sap.com/api/sap-s4-CE_BATCHBULKRPLCTNINFORMATION-v1/overview

for creating new batches and updating existing batches.
Not clear to us is the use of element ChangeOrdinalNumberValue. We noticed that setting a value for this field is required since SAP otherwise rejects/ignores this request (see screenshot).
Therefore we set ChangeOrdinalNumberValue to 1, as result the batch were created. For updating this batch we would need to set a greater ChangeOrdinalNumberValue.
Our first idea was to read the current ChangeOrdinalNumberValue via Batch Master Record ODATA API (similar to the eTag handling concept) but this API doesn't provide the ChangeOrdinalNumberValue in its response.

https://api.sap.com/api/API_BATCH_SRV/overview


Our current idea is to convert the current date/ date of the request to a unix timestamp and use this as ChangeOrdinalNumberValue so that newer requests have always a greater ChangeOrdinalNumberValue.

Questions is what is best practices of this ChangeOrdinalNumberValue handling when connecting a third party WMS? We don't want to force the WMS to store all ChangeOrdinalNumberValue in its system and looking for a automated solution.

We definitely want to use the SOAP API to have monitoring in AIF.

Thanks and best regards

Robert

entry.title: Re: Retraining Assignments / Self registration
entry.content:
We created a curriculum for a specific item that requires retraining every two years.

The required date varies depending on the training history.If an employee completed the training in 2023, they must retake it in 2025. If the training was completed in 2024, they will need to retake it in 2026. If an employee has never taken the training before, they do not receive any assignment. 

We scheduled five sessions in 2025 that are open for self registration. We would like to restrict access to these sessions only to those employees who need to be trained in 2025. Unfortunately, all employees who have been assigned the training currently have access to it.

entry.title: Re: FLP failed to load catalogs after system copy - what...
entry.content:
@hnitsch wrote:

Hello,

after systemcopy from testsystem to sandbox it's not possible to use Fiori. 

It is possible to log in to the FLP from sandbox, but then the message appears "Failed to load catalogs".

In testsystem FLP works fine.

What adjustments are necessary after a system copy? Who has experience with this?

thanks in advance

best regards Holger

Hello @hnitsch,
It sounds like you're experiencing an issue with the Fiori Launchpad (FLP) after performing a system copy from testsystem to sandbox. This is a known issue, and there are a few adjustments you might need to make: Your Texas Benefitsi

  1. Check System Aliases: Ensure that the system aliases are correctly pointing to the new sandbox system.

  2. SSO Configuration: Verify that Single Sign-On (SSO) is properly configured with the backend system.

  3. Web Dispatcher: Make sure that the new sandbox server is correctly added to the Web Dispatcher for routing requests.

  4. Post-Installation Steps: Follow the necessary post-installation steps, such as consistency checks and removing unnecessary RFC connections.

If you've already tried these steps and the issue persists, it might be helpful to reach out to SAP Support for further assistance.

Best regards,
Peter Philip

entry.title: Re: Usage and differences between MRS , RSH and FSM
entry.content:
Hi Radhakmk,

It is possible to continue using SAP MRS (SAP MRS FOR S4HANA 1.0) with an end of mainstream maintenance unitl 31.12.2030. This is applicable for versions of SAP S/4HANA until SAP S/4HANA 2023. For SAP ECC the EoMM is 31.12.2027, with the option of extended maintenance until 31.12.2030 (this would have additional costs/contract, etc.). For a conversion from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA, this would be possible but best to discuss with your dedicated account team on what makes most sense for your company. Generally we would advise customers to start planning to migrate from SAP MRS to SAP FSM, or SAP RSH, more info in this blog. 

Kind regards,
Ryan

entry.title: Re: SAP Universal ID S users - issue
entry.content: Thanks a lot. I sent an email to sso@sap.com and it got sorted.

entry.title: How to notify to user when invoices are not fully cleared in F110 (Payment run)
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question regarding an issue similar to the one described in the below SAP Notes.
3318007 - Error VF 348 in F110 | SAP Knowledge Base Article
I referred to SAP Note 3318007 and made the suggested changes, but there were no visible effects after implementing them.


In F110, when the user execute the Payment Run, it shows a green light with the message "Payment run has been carried out." However, I found that not all invoices are actually cleared.

Is there a way to modify the message to display a warning or error in such cases, using BTE, BAdI, or Enhancement?

It is important for users to be informed whether invoices have been fully cleared or partially cleared.
Please let me know if there is an effective way to solve this.

Thank you.

entry.content: That is great Arda! Greetings from Germany.

entry.title: Digital Signature configuration for Flexible number range for billing document.
entry.content:
Hi Experts

We are trying flexible number range for one our entity were our number range prefix have alphanumeric combination. And we want to use same number range interval in the following configuration (Record Number Ranges for Digital Signature of Billing Documents (SD). But we couldn't able to add those intervals. Any help how we can configure this for flexible number range. Thanks in Advance.

Regards,

Raj Kumar G

entry.title: UI5 - Failed to load 'sap/uxap/ObjectPageLayout.js'
entry.content:
Hello, I'm currently doing a UI5 course and I've encountered a problem with sap.uxap library in this chapter . I used code provided in the course and I'm trying to use sap.uxap elements in Detail.view.xml

 

<mvc:View controllerName="student02.com.sap.training.ux402.listdetail.ux402listdetail.controller.Detail"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:ux="sap.uxap"
    xmlns:layout="sap.ui.layout">
    <ux:ObjectPageLayout id="objectPageLayout">
        <ux:headerTitle>
            <ux:ObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle id="objectPageDynamicHeader">
                <ux:expandedHeading>
                    <Title
                        id="title1"
                        text="{Carrname}"
                        level="H2"/>
                </ux:expandedHeading>
            </ux:ObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle>
        </ux:headerTitle>
        <ux:headerContent>
            <FlexBox wrap="Wrap" id="flexBox">
                <Avatar id="avatar" src="sap-icon://flight"/>
                <layout:VerticalLayout id="verticalLayout1" class="sapUiSmallMarginBeginEnd">
                    <Label id="label1" text="{Carrid}"/>
                    <Label id="label2" text="{Url}"/>
                </layout:VerticalLayout>
            </FlexBox>
        </ux:headerContent>
        <ux:sections>
            <ux:ObjectPageSection id="objectPageSection">
                <ux:ObjectPageSubSection id="objectPageSubSection1">
                    <Table id="table" headerText="{i18n>tableHeaderText}" items="{to_Connection}" 
                           noDataText="{i18n>tableNoDataText}">
                        <columns>
                            <Column id="column1">
                                <Text id="text1" text="{i18n>idColumnText}"/>
                            </Column>
                            <Column id="column2">
                                <Text id="text2" text="{i18n>cityFromColumnText}"/>
                            </Column>
                            <Column id="column3">
                                <Text id="text3" text="{i18n>cityToColumnText}"/>
                            </Column>
                        </columns>
                        <items>
                            <ColumnListItem id="columnListItem">
                                <cells>
                                    <Text id="text4" text="{Carrid}"/>
                                    <Text id="text5" text="{Cityfrom}"/>
                                    <Text id="text6" text="{Cityto}"/>
                                </cells>
                            </ColumnListItem>
                        </items>
                    </Table>
                </ux:ObjectPageSubSection>
            </ux:ObjectPageSection>
        </ux:sections>
    </ux:ObjectPageLayout>
</mvc:View>

 

Then, when I click on the button that routes to this view I get an error in the browser 

I also tried to access resources link from which ObjectPageLayout.js should be accessed and there is nothing in the uxap repository ( https://port8080-workspaces-ws-clgqm.us10.trial.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/resources/sap )

Does this mean that the error is on the side of API and not in my project?

Thanks in advance for responses.

Michal

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for Utilizing Concur’s Identity v4 and User Provisioning v4 Webservices
entry.content:
Hi @RickF,

thanks for the blog series.

I have a question related to SAP IPS and role assignment in SAP Concur.
When I have understand it correct, the SAP IPS is using the Concur Identity V4 API to provisioning users. In the Identity V4 API documentation is nothing mentioned related to roles.

I tried the path from the UPS API (urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:spend:2.0:Role) but it is saying, that it doesnt know this targetpath.

Do you have any ideas?

The user provisioning itself works already, but not the role assignment (EXP_USER, REQ_USER

Thanks,
Vincent

entry.title: Re: Configuring the proxy CO_CRM_ISX_CC_CATALOG_SERVICES
entry.content:
Hi Eric,

thank you for your comment. SAP Basis version is 750 and according to the note, re-creating the Consumer Proxy using the same WSDL as the one used for the Logical Port in SOAMANAGER was proposed.



I did what was suggested but still get the error: 

The similar behavior was observed also in another CRM system on another client. Could it be that the v3 version of the Catalog WS is not compatible with CO_CRM_ISX_CC_CATALOG_SERVICES? In S4Hana system the proxy CO_CRMS4_SOM_CC_V3_CATALOG_SER can be very easily configured with the V3 WS. 

Thank you,
Doris

entry.title: Copy Custom field from service order to PR
entry.content:
Hi

I want to define a custom field at solution order header/item level and want it to be copied to service order and eventually on the PR that gets created from the service order. 

I don't see a business scenario where I can enable such copying. There are options to enable copying from service transaction to sales transactions. But nothing to copy to a purchase requisition. 

Any help is appreciated. 

Regards,

Deepti

entry.title: SAP CTS/TMS: disable step "Report and screen generation" during a transport import
entry.content:
Hello NetWeaver ABAP basis community,
during a CTS transport import (done by STMS_IMPORT), there is the step "Report and screen generation" (example of steps during import is here) which starts to compile the imported objects.

We like to disable this step per transport, per system whatever is possible. Does anybody know if/how this could be possible ?

Thanks & best regards,
 Matthias

I darkly remember a option in SAINT/SPAM where it was possible to set somewhat like "always", "as SAP requests", "never" but this seems not available in STMS for "regular" (no SPAM/SAINT) transports.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: My area of expertise lies in SAP consulting, with experience specializing in the FI and SD modules. I have extensive experience in customizations, internal developments, and integrations with third-party systems. My work involves designing and implementing tailored solutions to meet business needs, ensuring seamless process optimization and compliance with financial regulations.

entry.title: Re: Copy Custom field from service order to PR
entry.content:
Hello,

Define the Custom Field in Solution Order
You can create the custom field at the solution order level (either at the header or item level) in your system using the relevant object or master data extension (e.g., custom field extension in SAP C4C, Salesforce, or other ERP/CRM systems).
Ensure the field is available on both the solution order header and item levels.
2. Transfer the Custom Field to the Service Order
In systems like SAP, Salesforce, or others with order management capabilities, you typically use a function module, BADI (Business Add-In), or a similar mechanism to populate the custom field from the solution order to the service order.
If your system allows copying fields between different order types (like solution orders to service orders), you might need to create a custom enhancement for this purpose. This could be a trigger, user exit, or workflow action that copies the custom field from the solution order to the service order when certain conditions are met.
3. Linking the Service Order to Purchase Requisition
Since there is no standard functionality to copy directly to a Purchase Requisition (PR) from a service order, you will need to implement custom logic for this step.
If your service order is integrated with your procurement system (e.g., SAP, Oracle), you can set up a custom process that automatically transfers data from the service order (including the custom field) to the PR. This might involve writing a custom program or BADI to fetch the service order data, including the custom field, and then populate the corresponding field in the PR when it's created.
4. Custom Field Mapping for PR Creation
Create a custom mapping between the service order and the PR. This might involve extending the PR creation logic so that the custom field from the service order is passed onto the PR during the PR generation process.
Depending on your system, this can either be done through a manual step (e.g., using workflows or approval processes) or by automating it through system scripts or custom integrations.
5. Testing and Validation
Ensure you test the entire flow (solution order → service order → purchase requisition) to verify that the custom field is correctly populated at each stage.
It's also a good practice to check that the field remains intact and updated if the service order undergoes any changes after the PR is created.

 

Best Regards
MyFordBenefits website

entry.title: Re: Start authorization for R3TR IWSV API_PURCHASEREQ_PROCESS_SRV 0001, return code 4
entry.content: Did you solve it?

entry.title: Re: "/DMO/AGENCY_D" is not a suitable draft persistency f...
entry.content: This issue still happens 20/01/2025. I tried to create a case in SAP Learning Self Service, and they just said they don't support learning journey issues.

entry.title: Re: How to analyse BEx Query performance using "RSRT" on...
entry.content:
Hi,
the core functions in RSRT remain same in BW/4HANA, there are some enhancements, but that should be all.
Press "Execute and Debug", select "collect Statistics" + "Co not use Cache" and run the query.
When you see the query result, use the green arrow to go back.
Finally you should see the runtimes. The event IDs starting 9* are the DB times, the rest is mainly OLAP processing time.
Regards - Frank

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Graph Workspace with LangChain
entry.content:
@sandesh_arote Thank you for the blog explaining practical aspects of building a Knowledge Graph on HANA Graph capabilities.

entry.title: Re: SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI Now Available
entry.content:
@sam_venkat 

Yes, you can use both technologies in parallel. The token type can be specified for each system and also on the user level.

entry.title: How do I edit the timestamp of the SFTP Adapter in SAP PO?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Is there a smart way to customize the SFTP adapter scenario where I can change the standard function Timestamp for the file name from out-kostenstelle-YYYYMMTT-HHmmss.xml to out-kostenstelle-YYYYMMTT.xml? 

We are using PI 7.5 single stack. 

Kind regards,

Miguel

entry.title: Re: Query with SAP Note 3508244 - Incompatible Change in...
entry.content:
Hi @RobertWaywell / @Dan_vL , 

Thanks for taking your time in checking my query.

This is to confirm that upgrading HANA Cloud DB to version 2024.40.10 (QRC 4/2024) will fix this issue. We tried from our end. It worked!.

entry.title: Inquiry About Table for Storing Email Addresses for SM37 Job Notifications

I am looking for some clarification regarding a specific functionality in SAP. Specifically, I would like to know which table stores the email addresses that are used for sending notifications about job statuses in SM37.

If there are multiple tables or additional configurations involved, I would appreciate any detailed guidance or references.

Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide to ECC to S/4HANA Migration with Migration Cockpit

entry.title: External Program Call Fails
entry.content:
Hi,

SM37 jobs with an external program call cancels -

SXPG_STEP_XPG_START: is_local_host: rc = 403
SXPG_STEP_XPG_START: host = vms4bauapd01
SXPG_STEP_XPG_START: is_local_r3_host: rc = 802
SXPG_STEP_XPG_START: RFC_TCPIP_CONNECTION_OPEN: rc = 1007
Failed to receive scheduling status of external program

Best regards,
Mars

entry.title: SUM Run DMIS_CNT2011_1_731.SAR archive doesn’t exist
entry.content:
Good Day

I am running SUM in preparation of the upgrade from 1909 to 2023.

 

However, it fails because the DMIS_CNT2011_1_731.SAR archive doesn’t exist, its not being downloaded via the maintenance planner probably due to license or authorization issues.
